_doc: Hand-authored fixtures for a runtime immediate-fault of a trigger-based attended automation (job 4b7c2e19, process OrderEntryAssistant, folder Operations). The job Faults ~3s after start: Main.xaml places two separate Trigger Scope blocks inside one Parallel ('Monitor Shortcuts'), and the local robot service allows only one active trigger-monitoring session per execution, so the second Trigger Scope throws InvalidOperationException the instant it tries to register its hook. Error log carries the exception (Parallel on the stack); Info logs show the first scope registered then the fault. Matching is token-aware with plain-substring fallback (first match wins).

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language query; proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
